mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.cart (user_id, product_id, option_id, quantity, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{optionId}, #{quantity}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS cartId, c.product_id AS productId, c.option_id AS optionId, c.quantity, p.brand, p.name AS productName, p.price, p.discount_price AS discountPrice, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, o.option_name AS optionName, o.additional_price AS additionalPrice, pi.image_url AS imageUrl FROM `petlog`.cart c INNER JOIN `petlog`.product p ON c.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`option` o ON c.option_id = o.id LEFT JOIN `petlog`.product_image pi ON p.id = pi.product_id AND pi.is_thumbnail = true WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT id AS optionId, option_name AS optionName, additional_price AS additionalPrice, stock FROM `petlog`.`option` WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY id ASC
